class Scheduler:
    def __init__(self):
        self.tasks = []

    def add_task(self, task, queue=[]):
        queue.append(task)
        self.tasks.append(task)
        if len(queue) > 3:

            threads.append(th)
            th.start()
        for th in threads:

        print(f"Executing {task}")
